did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain results. It employed a proof-of-concept methodology using ImageJ software to perform manual region of interest (ROI) delineation and calculate Shannon entropy metrics from smartphone photographs of melanoma and nevus lesions. The study explicitly states it is a low-cost, reproducible framework for objective color heterogeneity assessment and notes that future validation should include comparative performance analyses against established diagnostic frameworks, implying no AI model was used in this specific work.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
